de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.TermBuilder
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    AuxiliaryContractBuilders

    public static final class AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder
extends TermBuilder
    This class is used to build various sub-formulas used in the block/loop contract rules.s

      • buildReachableInCondition

        public Term buildReachableInCondition(ImmutableSet<ProgramVariable> localInVariables)
        Parameters:
        localInVariables - all free local variables in the block.
        Returns:
        the condition that all of those variables have valid values.

      • buildReachableOutCondition

        public Term buildReachableOutCondition(ImmutableSet<ProgramVariable> localOutVariables)
        Parameters:
        localOutVariables - all free local variables modified by the block.
        Returns:
        the condition that all of those variables have valid values.

      • buildReachableCondition

        public Term buildReachableCondition(ImmutableSet<ProgramVariable> variables)
        Parameters:
        variables - a set of variables.
        Returns:
        the condition that all of those variables have valid values.

        public Term buildWellFormedAnonymisationHeapsCondition(java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Function> anonymisationHeaps)
        Parameters:
        anonymisationHeaps - anonymisation heaps.
        Returns:
        the condition that all anonymisation heaps are well-formed.

      • buildAtMostOneFlagSetCondition

        public Term buildAtMostOneFlagSetCondition()
        Returns:
        the condition that at most one flag for abrupt termination is true.

      • buildSelfConditions

        public Term buildSelfConditions(java.util.List<LocationVariable> heaps,
                                IProgramMethod pm,
                                KeYJavaType selfKJT,
                                Term self,
                                Services services)
        Builds the assumptions for the self variable (self != null & self.created == true & exactInstance(self))
        Parameters:
        heaps - the heaps.
        pm - the method containg the block.
        selfKJT - the self variable's type.
        self - the self variable.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the assumptions for the self variable.
